summary: W828 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and adds a typeclass-resolved BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory route for MetrizableLCA. The route has no explicit semantic input record, but seven concrete Dbounded stable instance families are still missing before it can be a completion witness.
